generated_oml:
// Sensing components
instance LiDARPointCloudSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor providing 3D point cloud data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudRaw
]

instance DepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera capturing RGB-D images."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraImageRaw
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring wheel speed."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedSignal
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing steering wheel position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleSignal
]

// Data transmitted
instance LiDARPointCloudRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARPointCloudSensor
]

instance DepthCameraImageRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCameraSensor
]

instance VehicleSpeedSignal : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleSignal : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// Data records
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Filtered LiDAR point cloud used for clustering."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudRaw
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera image processed for 3D reconstruction."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraImageRaw
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurement used for control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedSignal
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurement used for tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleSignal
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance PointCloudClustersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustered point cloud representing detected objects."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated by Kalman filter."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PointCloudClustersData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance ACCStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Automated Cruise Control state output."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance SQLStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database of vehicle state information."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ACCStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

// Models
instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds to detect objects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model for tracking object positions over time."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control algorithm using vehicle speed and steering data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK
]

// Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for message passing between sensors, models, and services."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCOffloadingService, RemoteACCManagementService, VehicleVisualizationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX hardware platform providing GPU acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCOffloadingService, RemoteACCManagementService, VehicleVisualizationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetPackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack SDK providing drivers and libraries for Jetson."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCOffloadingService, RemoteACCManagementService, VehicleVisualizationService
]

instance PythonRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime for running data processing scripts."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlusRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ runtime for high-performance modules."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for model-based development."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteACCManagementService
]

instance OPCUAInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC UA interface for optional industrial communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CustomDataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Front-End for converting raw sensor data to processes."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of vehicle sensor data and state."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, VehicleStateInsight, InitiateEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ACCOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC computation to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCStateInsight, EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction
]

instance RemoteACCManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling remote override of ACC settings."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustDesiredSpeedAction, ACCStateInsight
]

instance VehicleVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service for vehicle and environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleModelInsight, EnvironmentInsight
]

// Insights
instance VehicleSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting current vehicle speed."
]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting current steering angle."
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing overall vehicle state."
]

instance ACCStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight presenting ACC status and target speed."
]

instance EnableACCInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating ACC can be enabled."
]

instance DisableACCInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating ACC should be disabled."
]

instance AdjustDesiredSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight suggesting desired speed adjustment."
]

instance VehicleModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing 3D model of vehicle in environment."
]

instance EnvironmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight depicting surrounding environment in 3D."
]

instance EmergencyEventInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting emergency braking event."
]

// Actions
instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action enabling the ACC system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action disabling the ACC system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action adjusting the desired speed for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance InitiateEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action initiating emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Acting components
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator translating desired speed to motor voltage on the vehicle."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator controlling wheel steering based on desired commands."
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator command to initiate emergency braking."
]

// Environments
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LiDARPointCloudSensor, DepthCameraSensor, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuationComponent, SteeringServoActuationComponent, EmergencyBrakingActuationComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ACCControlModel,
           ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetPackSDK, PythonRuntime, CPlusPlusRuntime,
           MATLABSimulink, OPCUAInterface, CustomDataTranslationFE,
           DataMonitoringService, ACCOffloadingService, RemoteACCManagementService, VehicleVisualizationService,
           LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraImageData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData,
           PointCloudClustersData, ObjectTrackData, ACCStateData, SQLStateData,
           VehicleSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, VehicleStateInsight,
           ACCStateInsight, EnableACCInsight, DisableACCInsight, AdjustDesiredSpeedInsight,
           VehicleModelInsight, EnvironmentInsight, EmergencyEventInsight,
           EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, AdjustDesiredSpeedAction, InitiateEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Desired speed setpoints sent to motor, steering commands, ACC enable/disable, and emergency braking command sent to the vehicle"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247‑based constellation with Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity interconnected via Data Translation FE over Wi-Fi; each entity deployed on its respective hardware"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated stage (monitoring and remote management during vehicle operation)"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real-time fidelity ensured by ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization; data integrity maintained through unit conversions and serialization in Data Translation FE; validation performed through live operation and reporting"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network between vehicle and remote DT, ROS 2 DDS over UDP for intra-entity communication, and Data Translation FE handling serialization between ROS and TCP/IP"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosted on a remote cloud server, data storage in an SQL database, and User Interface running on the operator's device or local workstation"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework), ISO/IEC 30173 (Digital Twin concepts), and ROS 2 middleware"
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operations addressed via low-latency requirement (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization; however, detailed cybersecurity and safety analysis for remote execution is not specified"
]
